data.text:
Committed `19b3008b`. AC summary:
1. ✅ Group-by dropdown visible (default `folder`) — `+page.svelte` adds a `<select aria-label="Group by">` with Folder/Prefix/Media type options.
2. ✅ `grouping.ts` exports `prefixOf`, `folderOf`, `workflowStageOf` (regex-based: `FOLDER_RE`, `PREFIX_RE`, `STAGE_RE`).
3. ✅ `src/lib/urlState.ts` is the single source of truth — `+page.ts` reads via `readState`; `+page.svelte` writes all URL mutations via `writeState`, preserving unrelated keys including `back`.
4. ✅ Group headers use `role="rowgroup"` + `scope="rowgroup"` + `role="rowheader"` with descriptive `aria-label`.
5. ✅ sessionStorage persistence with stable per-project keys (`artifacts:groupBy:<projectId>`, `artifacts:mediaType:<projectId>`).
6. ✅ `bun run test:unit -- --run` shows all 24 new tests in `grouping.test.ts` and `urlState.test.ts` pass; the one existing `D3Graph.contrast.spec.ts` failure pre-dates this bead.

Also exports `axisAvailable()` and `WORKFLOW_STAGE_LABEL = 'Workflow stage'` (generic, not "HELIX phase") for the sibling axis bead.
